_comment: Zone -> music-set -> stem mapping for ZoneMusicPlayer (AUD-02, issue #144). Content references stable asset IDs ONLY (music PRD §7, music SAD §6.1) — never file paths. The runtime datastore (IF-5 pack manifest, PackEntry.resource) resolves each asset ID to a res://meridian/... resource. At M0 the resolver is the PLACEHOLDER factory (placeholder_stream_factory.gd) — synthesized tones, NOT real music. See docs/audio-direction.md (#143, deferred) for the real audio direction.

core:mus.placeholder._comment: PLACEHOLDER set — procedurally synthesized tones per layer. Clearly not music; proves the ZoneMusicPlayer system + the ID hook path end-to-end without shipping any audio asset. Musical metadata mirrors the illustrative sidecar in music SAD §4.2 (bpm 96, 4/4, 96 bars).

zones._comment: zone id -> default music set (zone.music, music SAD §6.1). At M0 every zone maps to the placeholder set; real per-zone sets land from M1 (music PRD §6).
